beats: Protagonist A notices old newspapers pasted on the wall.
The date on the newspaper is the day after his mother disappeared.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 墙上贴着旧报纸，日期停在母亲失踪后的第二天。

prompt.positive: Close-up of old newspapers on a wall, date visible, man looking at them, dim light, mysterious, cinematic, shallow depth of field
